overrides-notes.monaco-dompurify: monaco-editor 0.55.1 hard-pins dompurify 3.2.7 which has multiple XSS CVEs; remove when monaco-editor updates its dompurify pin to >=3.4.0
overrides-notes.form-data: transitive dep pulled below the patched 4.0.6 (CRLF injection, GHSA-fjxv-7rqg-78g4); remove when dependents pull >=4.0.6
overrides-notes.js-yaml: transitive dep pinned at 4.1.1 (quadratic-complexity DoS, GHSA-mw6h-x9hf-q4rm); pinned to 4.x (^4.2.0) to avoid the js-yaml 5 major bump; remove when dependents pull >=4.2.0
overrides-notes.@babel/core: build-tool dep with arbitrary file read advisory; pinned to 7.x (^7.29.6) to avoid the babel 8 major bump; remove when @vitejs/plugin-react pulls >=7.29.6
overrides-notes.esbuild: vite 8 (rolldown) pulls esbuild 0.27.3 as an optional peer (dev-server file read on Windows); remove when vite pulls >=0.28.1
